positive: Stylized, minimalist illustration of a fantastical forest canopy. The scene features interconnected, stylized silhouettes of bioluminescent foliage, abstract fauna (such as glowing moths and stylized butterflies), and curved, root-like structures. The color palette should utilize deep indigo and forest teal, accented by electric cyan and soft, magical gold light emanating from the leaves. Composition must be highly symmetrical and circular, designed as a seamless, repeat-pattern element centered within the frame. Strong use of negative space and clean, crisp lines. Vector art aesthetic, woodcut print quality, high contrast, graphic design for apparel, flat style, isometric perspective, octane render, studio lighting, extremely detailed.
